name_cn:
Factory-level Dior Groove🔆 16 Mini Handbag "Ivory"
This Dior Groove 16 mini handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from calfskin, featuring a quilted oversized trellis pattern to elevate the style. Spacious compartment to hold various daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for daily looks.
Zipper closure
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Size: 16 x 10 x 8 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 card holder, keys, and lipstick
